title: senecio oxyriifolius
intro: Senecio oxyriifolius, also known as New Zealand fireweed or ragwort, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio oxyriifolius include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
